subject: Re:
body:
You need to be at the next meeting.. , You and I both knew that the fascade is not portugese tiles, so wouldn't be easier in the future if the plans reflect, "not yet chosen," then  putting  things in that are clearly wrong. it serves no purpose and only reinforces our , mine and your s problem.


----- Original Message ----
From: "jpm6929@aol.com" <jpm6929@aol.com>
To: jeeproject@yahoo.com
Cc: daschoettle@yahoo.com; lagonda@molyneuxstudio.com; doug@molyneuxstudio.com
Sent: Thursday, March 15, 2007 3:34:03 AM
Subject: 


Jeffrey, It is true that more than a month ago Charles told Doug that the return was (silly?) in the baseboard, but I have not heard from anyone from McGuire to give us any indication on the mechanical. Are they expecting also from us to draw in the interior elevations the exact location of all the air grilles that so far no one has designed? Maybe they were in all those drawings that they threw away, that I never saw. Anyway, I thought that the purpose of sending them the drawings was to discuss them and make the corrections or changes, to just say who the hell is drawing them is not very nice.
The elevations are the same as before, (your Doug said to me many times that for the time being that was not at all important) while I , as I told you, am doing (against all bets ) a try using the local stone ( not the bluebitch ) for the facade of the Pool House and your office. The stone mason will be in the island the last week of March, and of the samples of what  he has seen that I took in a bag on my last trip ,he thinks is good. I will finish the drawing, if you want, even though we are not that sure yet that we can mill that stone. J.P. 
 
-----Original Message-----
From: jeeproject@yahoo.com
To: jpm6929@aol.com
Sent: Wed, 14 Mar 2007 3:30 PM
Subject: Re: Island, House in the island and Moscow
